/this-is-free-xyz.reason: No matching route, no view page, and no existing path alias. Free to use.

/moderated-content.reason: No route or alias. The moderated_content view lives at /admin/content/moderated, not this path, so no conflict now or after enabling moderation views.

/blog.reason: Already an existing path alias (id=23) pointing to /page/2 (canvas_page 'Blog'). A new node alias /blog would duplicate/collide with this alias.

/search.reason: Matches the static route view.search.page (the enabled core search View page at /search). Routes win over aliases, so the node would be unreachable at this path.

/admin/content/files.reason: The core 'files' View is present but DISABLED, with a page display whose path is exactly /admin/content/files. Enabling that View (a routine config change) registers a route here that would shadow the alias.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: The 'scheduler_scheduled_media' View (Scheduler module is installed) is present but DISABLED, with a page display at exactly /admin/content/media/scheduled. Turning on media scheduling / enabling that View registers a route that would shadow the alias.
